You are a Go engineer. Build an order management service in Go.

Requirements:
- Create orders with a customer name and a total amount in cents
- Retrieve an order by its ID
- Validate that customer name is not empty
- Expose a REST API with POST /orders and GET /orders/{id}

Module name: example.com/experiment

Generate complete, compilable Go code. Choose whatever packages and file structure
you think is best for a production-quality service.

Return ONLY the file contents using this exact format with no other text:
=== <filepath> ===
[complete file content]

Include all files needed for a working implementation.
